paragraphs: Bright ideas start here. Browse for expert design advice, product news and stories from behind the scenes.
See how Heat & Glo transformed the Jones family’s living space with Military Makeover. A heartwarming reveal featuring the innovative Inception fireplace.
Transform your fireplace into a festive centerpiece this holiday season with decorating ideas for Thanksgiving, Christmas, and New Year’s.
Make your home the heart of the holidays with a Heat & Glo fireplace. Enjoy warmth, style, and cherished moments with family and friends this season.

Join Heather Ison as she transforms her traditional wood-burning fireplace into a stunning centerpiece with Heat & Glo’s Escape gas insert. Discover the perfect blend of style, warmth, and efficiency for your home.
See how Heat & Glo collaborated with Military Makeover to bring warmth and style to a veteran's home with their innovative Inception fireplace.
We teamed up with “Trending Today” to break five common misconceptions about fireplaces in today’s market.
Explore six unique fireplace TV wall designs that bring together warmth, style, and functionality for a cozy and elegant living space.
Get inspired with this DIY install of our most realistic electric fireplace by architect Christine Nickerson.
Transform your living space with the perfect blend of warmth and modern design. Discover how Heat & Glo fireplaces and Samsung Frame TV elevate your home’s aesthetic.
Upgrade your home with a sleek, modern Heat & Glo gas linear fireplace. Enjoy real flames, easy control, and stunning designs that enhance any room's aesthetic.
Find fresh ideas for a floating fireplace shelf, from selecting the perfect mantel material to styling its finishing touches.
Discover how to safely mount a TV above your fireplace using advanced heat management solutions. Create a stylish and functional focal point in your living room.
Explore the captivating outdoor fireplaces from HGTV's "Rock the Block." See how each team uniquely transformed their spaces, inspiring your next backyard makeover.
Find out how an unconventional electric fireplace setup on HGTV's Rock the Block showcases their flexible design possibilities.
Design a wall that’s straight fire with a gas linear fireplace.
See your dream fireplace before you build. Use ChatGPT to visualize a Heat & Glo electric fireplace in your space with just a photo and a few clicks.
Discover the latest in-home design on HGTV's Rock the Block, featuring sleek fireplace additions and luxurious primary bedroom makeovers that redefine modern living.

Dive into the stylish world of HGTV's Rock the Block. From organic modern to tropical retreats, discover how top designers transform living spaces with innovative fireplace designs. Unlock fresh decorating ideas and practical tips to elevate your home.
See how designer Emily Henderson combined a cozy aesthetic with a modern gas fireplace in this bedroom reveal.
Embark on a fireplace makeover journey with our guide to gas inserts. Discover the convenience, safety, and added value, transforming your space into a stylish haven.
Electric fireplaces offer more than just a cozy glow! Discover their true heating capabilities.

Inception Electric Fireplace: Immerse yourself in the ambiance of a genuine fire encounter as flickering flames dance and LED embers glow, all brought to life by our innovative Digital Spark Technology.
Unleash the potential of your outdoor space with these fireplace ideas from HGTV home designers.
Give your fireplace surround a major makeover with tile. From warm and inviting colors to mix-and-match patterns, the possibilities are endless.
You can jazz up a non-functioning fireplace with books, candles or tchotchkes—or you could enjoy a warm, inviting fire instead.
Discover how to give your space the ultimate glow up.
Discover how to give your space the ultimate glow up.
Hunker’s design team shows how our Allusion Platinum electric fireplace added warmth to their great room with an accessible DIY and modern touches.
Our industrial designers match their suggested best fits to get the look you want in 10 popular interior design styles.
The styles are at opposite ends of the spectrum—traditional and contemporary. Let us help you decide what's right for your home.
8 ways to warm up to wooden fireplace surrounds.
Winning combinations of living room design and how a fireplace factors in.
See how one interior designer makes her client’s modern farmhouse dreams come true, putting fireplaces center stage in living rooms of every size.
Clean-lined, contemporary and beautiful, this modern linear gas fireplace fits in everywhere.
TVs and fireplaces share the most attention-getting spots in the home. Thanks to heat management technology, they can be installed in the same place.
Now more than ever, fireplaces are eye-catching focal points that set the design tone.
It’s possible to enjoy a single fireplace both inside and outside your home!
Extend the comforts of your home with a welcoming and warm outdoor space.
